description_long: This is a two-story suburban house surrounded by a tall green hedge and situated on a rectangular lot. The house features a hip roof with a muted teal color and light tan brick or siding exterior walls. The front yard includes a paved driveway leading to a side garage and a formal entryway flanked by manicured bushes. The backyard is landscaped with a swimming pool, a small patio area, and a circular paved feature, as well as a swing set and additional greenery. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows on both floors, and the property is bordered by a hedge fence with a gate at the front. The overall design is clean, orderly, and typical of modern suburban residential architecture.
description: A two-story suburban house with a teal hip roof, tan exterior, symmetrical windows, and landscaped front and back yards featuring a pool and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway with a parked car, and symmetrical landscaping with hedges and bushes.
description_view_1: Side and rear view highlighting the hip roof, backyard pool, patio, and swing set, with the driveway visible to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio area, circular paved feature, and symmetrical window arrangement on both floors.
description_view_3: Opposite side and rear view showing the pool, swing set, and additional landscaping, with the garage and driveway on the far side.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, flanked by bushes, no porch or columns, and a hedge-lined path leading to a gate.
